name: Crockpot Caldillo (Green Chili Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the meat and sprinkle with salt. Fry until brown in oil.
2. Dice potatoes and add to the browned meat; slice onions and add them as well.
3. Add garlic, salt, and green chilies along with enough water to cover the ingredients.
4. Continue adding water if necessary to maintain a soupy consistency.
